name: Chicken Vesuvio
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dry white wine or vermouth
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F.
1. Cut the potatoes lengthwise into wedges.
2. Place the chicken and potatoes in a 13-inch x 9-inch nonstick baking pan.
3. Sprinkle with oregano, salt, and pepper. Drizzle with olive oil.
4. Bake for 30 minutes, stirring once to turn the pieces over.
5. Sprinkle the chicken and potatoes with garlic and wine.
6. Bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until the chicken juices run clear and the potatoes are tender.
7. Drizzle the pan juices over the chicken and potatoes on a platter.
8. Sprinkle with parsley and serve.
Serving Ideas: Serve with steamed broccoflower.
